_comment: Seed for coord_engine/default_models.json. Tags: code, architecture, writing, long-context (>=400k usable), vision, fast, tool-use. cost_rank: 1 = scarcest cap-weight, 9 = locally free. Sources: 2026-07-08 research pass (frontier + OSS), citations in session ledger.

claude-fable-5.notes: flagship; adaptive thinking always-on; slower latency

claude-opus-4-8.notes: complex agentic coding; effort defaults high

claude-sonnet-5.notes: Claude Code default; ~5x lighter cap-weight than Opus (documented)

claude-haiku-4-5.notes: fastest; escalates on multi-step agentic code

gpt-5.5.notes: Codex default; 400k nominal, client-reported ~258k usable; vision inferred

gpt-5.3-codex-spark.notes: ChatGPT Pro only; near-instant iteration; research preview

grok-4.20-0309-reasoning.notes: medium confidence on id string and CLI accept-list

qwen3-coder:30b.notes: default local agentic coder; q4 on 24GB

glm-4.7-flash.notes: strongest 30B-class agentic; q4 on 24GB; enable preserved-thinking for long loops

deepseek-v4-flash.notes: hosted overflow valve; ~$0.14/$0.28 per MTok; open weights but cloud-scale

_watch_items.gpt-5.6: Sol/Terra/Luna preview is API+partner only as of 2026-07-08; not consumer-dispatchable; ids unpublished. Add on ChatGPT GA.
_watch_items.glm-5.2: leads open-weights AA index but hosted/frontier-priced; add if a cheap endpoint appears.
_watch_items.kimi-k2.6: ollama :cloud only; competes on hosted price, not free; revisit.
